listings.description: Beautifully renovated character home set on a generous 506m² block, just 300m from Scarborough Beach. Featuring polished jarrah floors throughout, a modern open-plan kitchen with stone benchtops and quality appliances, and a north-facing alfresco area perfect for entertaining year-round. The property includes a separate studio at the rear that could serve as a home office, guest accommodation, or potential rental income. Three genuine bedrooms, two modern bathrooms, ducted reverse-cycle air conditioning, and a double carport. Walking distance to cafes, restaurants, the new Scarborough Beach Pool, and the revitalised foreshore precinct. This is coastal living at its finest — move in and enjoy.

Modern two-bedroom apartment in the heart of East Perth with stunning views over the Swan River and Langley Park. Open-plan living and dining flows onto a generous balcony — perfect for morning coffees watching the sun rise over the water. Well-appointed kitchen with stainless steel appliances and plenty of storage. Both bedrooms are a good size with built-in robes, and the bathroom features floor-to-ceiling tiles. Secure complex with intercom entry, gym, and lap pool. One secure car bay included. Walk to Claisebrook Cove cafes, Elizabeth Quay, and Perth CBD. Currently tenanted at $550/week — excellent investment opportunity or move in at lease end.

Spacious family home on a huge 720m² block in one of Karrinyup's most sought-after streets. Four bedrooms, two bathrooms, multiple living areas, and a massive backyard with room for a pool. The home has been well maintained with a new roof (2021), updated bathrooms, and freshly painted throughout. Open-plan kitchen, dining, and family room overlooks the rear garden. Formal lounge at the front provides a quiet retreat. Double lock-up garage with workshop space. Zoned for Karrinyup Primary and Carine Senior High. Minutes to Karrinyup Shopping Centre, Trigg Beach, and the freeway. Development potential (R20/40 zoning) — subject to council approval.

Architecturally designed townhouse just two streets from Cottesloe Beach. This stunning three-level home offers a lifestyle that most can only dream of. Ground floor features a single garage and separate entry. First floor has an open-plan kitchen, living, and dining area that opens to a sun-drenched terrace with ocean glimpses. Top floor houses three bedrooms including a master suite with walk-in robe, ensuite, and a private balcony. High ceilings, timber floors, stone benchtops, and premium fixtures throughout. Stroll to the beach, Indiana Tea House, and the Cottesloe village. No strata levies — individually titled.

Charming 1930s character home in the heart of East Fremantle. Original features including high ceilings, decorative cornices, fireplaces, and leadlight windows have been lovingly preserved. Three bedrooms, one updated bathroom, and a bright kitchen with gas cooking. The deep 450m² block features established gardens, a paved entertaining area under a mature jacaranda tree, and a garden shed. Walking distance to George Street cafes, the Royal Fremantle Golf Club, and the Swan River foreshore. A genuine opportunity to secure a character home in a tightly-held riverside suburb.

Sleek one-bedroom apartment in the Perth CBD with city views from the 8th floor. Modern open-plan design with floor-to-ceiling windows flooding the space with natural light. Kitchen features integrated fridge, dishwasher, and stone benchtops. Spacious bedroom with built-in robe and direct balcony access. Building amenities include rooftop terrace, BBQ area, and secure basement parking. Currently achieving $480/week rent with strong tenant demand. Walk score of 95 — everything you need is at your doorstep. Perfect for investors or first-home buyers looking for CBD lifestyle.

Modern family home in a quiet cul-de-sac in the established Baldivis Parks estate. This spacious 4x2 offers everything a growing family needs. Master suite with walk-in robe and ensuite at the front, three minor bedrooms with built-in robes in a separate wing. Open-plan kitchen, dining, and family room opens to a huge paved alfresco with cafe blinds — usable year-round. Theatre room at the front. Double remote garage with shoppers' entry. Ducted reverse-cycle air conditioning, bore-reticulated gardens, and 6.6kW solar panels keeping power bills minimal. Zoned for Baldivis Secondary College. Close to Stockland Baldivis shopping centre, parks, and freeway access.

Executive family home on a massive 835m² block in prestigious Wembley Downs. This custom-built five-bedroom, three-bathroom residence offers luxury at every turn. Grand entry with soaring void, formal and informal living areas, chef's kitchen with butler's pantry, and a resort-style backyard with heated below-ground pool, outdoor kitchen, and expansive decking. Ground floor master suite with his-and-hers robes and spa ensuite. Upstairs features four bedrooms, activity room, and family bathroom. Triple-phase power, ducted vacuum, security system, and abundant storage throughout. Walk to Hale School and Churchlands Senior High School zone.

Premium 680m² elevated block with sweeping ocean and estuary views in the sought-after Port Bouvard estate, Dawesville. One of the last remaining lots with dual water views in this tightly-held pocket. North-facing rear aspect provides excellent solar passive design opportunities. All services connected to the block boundary — power, water, sewer, and NBN fibre. Minutes to the Dawesville Cut, Melros Beach, and the Port Bouvard Marina. Building envelope approved with minimal restrictions — bring your dream home plans. A rare opportunity to secure an exceptional coastal block south of Mandurah.

Low-maintenance street-front villa in a quiet group of just four. Three bedrooms with built-in robes, updated bathroom, and an open-plan living area with split-system air conditioning. Private courtyard garden with paved entertaining area — low maintenance but with enough room for a dog or a veggie patch. Single lock-up garage. Strata fees are minimal ($380/quarter) covering building insurance only. Walk to Belmont Forum shopping centre, Great Eastern Highway cafes, and Rivervale bus routes. Easy freeway access to Perth CBD (10 minutes) and Perth Airport (8 minutes). Ideal for first-home buyers, downsizers, or investors — currently achieving $520/week.

offers.personalNote: We've been looking in Scarborough for over a year and this is exactly what we want. We're pre-approved and ready to go.
Beautiful home. Our finance is being processed and we expect approval within two weeks.
First home buyer here — we love the studio out the back for a home office.
Investment purchase. Happy to proceed quickly.
Stunning property. Would love to arrange a second viewing.
Love the no-strata aspect. Very interested.
Love the character. Any termite history?
Cash buyer. Can settle in 21 days if needed.
Large family, need the space. Happy to discuss settlement timing.
